info.title: WHO PreQualificaiton VaccineType  Schema API
info.description: JSON Schema for WHO PreQualificaiton VaccineType  ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-PreQualVaccineType
get.description: This endpoint serves the JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-PreQualVaccineType.

ValueSet-PreQualVaccineType.title: WHO PreQualificaiton VaccineType  Schema
ValueSet-PreQualVaccineType.description: JSON Schema for WHO PreQualificaiton VaccineType  ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.
ValueSet-PreQualVaccineType.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the WHO PreQualificaiton VaccineType  ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/pcmt-vaxprequal/ValueSet-PreQualVaccineType.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
